{

"judge_id": "J12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,

    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,

  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent output thoroughly audits each load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying several unsupported claims and inconsistencies.",
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies one prior work but fails to map against multiple works, weakening the novelty assessment.",
    "R1.7": "Flags missing key citations but doesn't audit every citation thoroughly.",
    "RX.1": "Discloses some uncertainties but doesn't mark confidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.",
    "RX.4": "Identifies harmful patterns in the original content, avoiding downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "Does not trace sources or annotate changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.75,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent output thoroughly audits each load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying several unsupported claims and inconsistencies.
rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies one prior work but fails to map against multiple works, weakening the novelty assessment.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing key citations but doesn't audit every citation thoroughly.
rationale.RX.1: Discloses some uncertainties but doesn't mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies harmful patterns in the original content, avoiding downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Does not trace sources or annotate changes.
